blockers.title: TxLINE public derived-display, caching, and retention permission
Authenticated TxLINE Devnet schema and terminal/correction semantics
evidence: docs/implementation-verification.md: redacted authenticated 14-day validation parsed 21,757 PascalCase records from 20 fixtures with zero failures, including 156 goals, 273 correction/VAR records, and 20 finalizations

blockers.title: Deployed claim compute, contention, drain-time, and retry benchmark
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json: two deployed registration/claim/new-ATA/round-close seams plus fan-authorized transfer; contention and drain benchmark remain pending

blockers.title: Devnet RPC and WebSocket capacity decision
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json: requester selected Foundation public Devnet RPC for the MVP; targeted acceptance passed, broad scans are disabled/fallback-safe, and scale settlement remains independently gated by RB-4

blockers.title: Eight-hour hard-timeout and postponed-match product approval
evidence: architecture.md Q9: requester authorized documented assumptions; eight-hour timeout and refund-on-postponement are adopted, while deployed provider completion/refund/release and local-validator hard-timeout paths both passed

blockers.title: Valueless classic SPL demo mint, faucet, and no-freeze policy
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json: classic six-decimal no-freeze valueless mint plus wallet-signed, one-distribution, 500-GOAL Devnet faucet passed on chain and duplicate use returned HTTP 409

blockers.title: Instant Demo signer containment and judge Quickstart review
evidence: docs/implementation-verification.md: production browser proved Instant Demo key absent from persistent storage and destroyed on reload; repository audit blocks private-key persistence; real registration/claim/transfer/reset path already passed
